headline: Aaron Melda Named Chairman and President of Ameren Missouri
summary: Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) announced today that Aaron Melda, an executive with more than 25 years of utility leadership experience, will be the next chairman and president of Ameren Missouri, an electric and gas service provider and subsidiary of Ameren Corporation.

raw.headline: Aaron Melda Named Chairman and President of Ameren Missouri
raw.summary: Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) announced today that Aaron Melda, an executive with more than 25 years of utility leadership experience, will be the next chairman and president of Ameren Missouri, an electric and gas service provider and subsidiary of Ameren Corporation.

headline: Google commits $15 billion to Missouri expansion with new data center project (GOOG)
summary: Google (NASDAQ:GOOG) announced plans on Wednesday to invest US$15 billion into infrastructure projects across Missouri, including the construction of a new data centre in New Florence, located in Montgomery County. Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe said the investment highlights the state’s increasing importance as a hub for technology and innovation.

headline: JP Morgan Upgrades Ameren to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $126
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   upgrades Ameren (NYSE:AEE) from Neutral to Overweight and raises the price target from $120 to $126.
